name: search-models
title: Search Models
description:
通过models.dev站点搜索模型的信息，个人场景如下：
1.  配置模型时需要知道供应商/模型名的准确信息；
2. 了解模型的价格
3. 查看模型的上下文、多模态支持情况
author: make3782

commands.name: search-models
commands.title: Search Models
commands.subtitle: search models from modes.dev
commands.description: 搜索并查看模型的供应商、价格、上下文窗口等基本信息

commands.name: model-diff
commands.title: Model Diff
commands.description: 模型对比功能，当前开发中，敬请期待

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
